history.speaker: client
history.text: No sesame oil in my stir‑fry (not on menu, but general)

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have stir-fry on the menu. How about one of our burgers? We have butter paneer grilled burgers and butter chicken grilled burgers.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Can you confirm the butter paneer burger is sesame-free?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hmm, I'm not sure about sesame specifically. But our regular burgers don't contain milk, so they might be a good option for you.
